input.user_input: How does the UCC Article 2 battle of the forms work when two parties exchange conflicting standard terms?

actual:
The "battle of the forms" under Article 2 of the Uniform Commercial Code (UCC) addresses the common commercial scenario where a buyer and seller exchange standard order forms (like purchase orders and invoices) that contain conflicting or additional terms.
